programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is caught between a rock and a hard place when he becomes responsible for distributing extra grant money; Bernadette turns the backyard playhouse into a hideaway to get away from her husband and kids.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy are devastated after learning from a Russian paper that Super Asymmetry has already been discovered and disproved; Bernadette wants to beat Howard in a popular video game.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: An agent (June Gable) offers Joey a movie role as Al Pacino's naked body double; Chandler dates a liberal woman (Sofia Milos).

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler finds himself trapped in an ATM vestibule with model Jill Goodacre during a city-wide power failure.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Nana Dies Twice
programme.desc: Monica and Ross share their feelings about death and their grandmother.

programme.title: The Fall and Rise of Reggie Dinkins
programme.desc: Monica tries to sign an exciting new prospect; Jerry Basmati unexpectedly takes revenge on Reggie.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to bond with Amy's father, but when Wolowitz lures Mr. Fowler away with magic tricks, Sheldon has no choice but to bond with Mrs. Fowler; Koothrappali and Anu try to get physical for the first time.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Dan starts to bond with his younger half brother, but he can't get over the fact that their father paid for Ed Jr.'s college education, something he refused to do for Dan; Jackie hits it off with a fun married couple.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Darlene, desperate for money, gets a job at Price Warehouse; Jackie decides to take her throuple relationship with Ron and Janelle to the next level; Ben shaves his beard in an attempt to appear more clean-cut to potential advertisers.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent installs a security camera at Corner Gas; Davis gets a stun gun.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: At bingo night, Wanda steps in after the regular bingo caller takes a tumble; she's a hit with everyone except Emma who takes drastic steps to restore her winning streak.

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: Brent gets his own private VIP section at the bar; Hank loses his keys and enlists Lacey's help to retrace his steps; Wanda attempts to retrain Davis's memory.

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: Davis accidentally totals the police cruiser and tries to cover it up; Hank and Wanda are tasked with making Dog River rat free; Emma struggles to get Oscar on board with spring-cleaning.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unassuming people enter a taxi cab as simple passengers taking a normal ride, only to be shocked when they discover that they're instant contestants. The host, Adam Grove, asks the passengers trivia questions as he escorts them to their destination.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Rob has never seen the show and Mike says it's his worst nightmare; different views in the Cash Cab; let's hope Darlene can balance these.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent installs a security camera at Corner Gas; Davis gets a stun gun.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Harris is newly unemployed, depressed and has moved back into the house, while Becky struggles to find affordable childcare; Jackie suggests Becky reach out to Emilio's family for support; the family contemplates tattoos.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Bev is back from Arizona and realizes she'd like to use her finances to spread happiness; Bev decides to fund Mark's tuition to a prestigious coding camp, but Darlene tries to convince her to give the money to Harris instead.

programme.sub-title: One Bad Night and Chaos of Selfish Desires
programme.desc: Sheldon and Missy both run away from home together; Mary gets some upsetting news about her husband, George.

programme.desc: Brent brings his arsenal of pitches to a slo-pitch game; Davis and Karen can't ignore an act of vandalism.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: A big air show is on nearby and the people of Dog River are excited; Lacey's breach of air show protocol has many in town upset.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent and Oscar form competing rinks in a cross-generational curling grudge match and Lacey is stuck in the middle.

programme.desc: We're getting married, so we need to cash! Ok, love birds, get it together! Wendy & Errol are cute, softly whispering to each other...
